<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Config; use Spatie\Backup\Exceptions\InvalidConfig; use Spatie\Backup\Support\Data; class NotificationMailConfig extends Data { /** @param string|array<string> $to */ protected function __construct( public string|array $to, public NotificationMailSenderConfig $from, ) {} /** * @param array<mixed> $data * * @throws InvalidConfig */ public static function fromArray(array $data): self { $to = is_array($data['to']) ? $data['to'] : [$data['to']]; foreach ($to as $email) { if (! filter_var($email, FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL)) { throw InvalidConfig::invalidEmail($email); } } return new self( to: $data['to'], from: NotificationMailSenderConfig::fromArray($data['from'] ?? []), ); } }
